response.justification: Strong generalist senior/staff engineer with 10+ years across full-stack, embedded, and distributed systems, plus founder-level ownership of an open-source platform. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core of this Principal Growth/Experimentation role. Title is also typically Senior/Staff, not Principal IC6, and there's no evidence of cross-org platform leadership at the scale required.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot engineering (TypeScript, Node, C/C++, Java, D) with production scale experience including millions of HTTP requests/second at Sociomantic
Demonstrated systemic thinking — built reusable frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, GISCollective platform) and DevOps/CI infrastructure used by multiple teams
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev) and teaching/mentorship via workshops and courses
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the central requirement
No evidence of telemetry/metrics platform work or statistical analysis / bias detection background
Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC; lacks documented Principal-level cross-team platform leadership and stakeholder alignment at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Strong systems and platform-building track record
